calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Continued To Jun-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francis Kelly for and with Antone Habash (Petitioner/Executor).

Mr. Kelly stated that since the property was free and clear that the only solution was to obtain a loan on the property to pay the obligations which would still leave the life estate for the Wife. Counsel will check with the beneficiaries to see if they are willing to advance funds. The matter was continued to June 24, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jackson.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Continued To Apr-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Continued To Apr-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francis Kelly for Petitioner.

There being no objections and no appearance by the Son of the decedent, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francis Kelly for the Petitioner. Osama Habash (Son) in Pro Per.

Mr. Habash requested a continuance stating that his attorney was not able to attend today's hearing. The matter was continued to May 13, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Osama Habash (Son of the decedent) in Pro Per.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Habash stated that he was objecting to the petition and that he needed time to hire a lawyer. The matter was continued to May 6, 2008.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: M. Loos.
